div.p: The Secretary of State in a letter to British Chargé Balfour, dated July 25, 1947, and British Ambassador Inverchapel, in his reply of October 9, 1947, agreed on arrangements whereby the United Kingdom would continue to furnish military equipment and supplies to the Greek armed forces and the United States obligated itself to pay for such arrivals after May 22, 1947; for texts, see Department of State Treaties and Other International Acts Series No. 1718, or 61 Stat. (pt. 4) 3763.
